text.title: openai-function-calling Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for openai-function-calling as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Calling client.beta.chat.completions.parse on gpt-3.5-turbo or older models.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Structured Outputs are only available on gpt-4o and newer. Calling parse on unsupported models raises NotImplementedError at runtime.
